docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $725.00 FILED BY WALDMANN, LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT SUNYALUX, TIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-03-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNYALUX, TIK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY WALDMANN, LYDIA SUNYALUX, TIK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALDMANN, LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT SUNYALUX, TIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALDMANN, LYDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNYALUX, TIK $587.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $627.50, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED RIGHT TO COLLECT SECURITY DEPOSIT, MINUS AMOUNT OF LOST RENT UNTIL TENANT COULD BE REPLACED. PLAINTIFF'S OTHER EXPENSES ARE DENIED REIMBURSEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
